overview.value: Ladyfinger Cactus forms clusters of narrow cylindrical stems covered in small spines. It is compact, drought tolerant, and ideal for bright windowsills.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Ladyfinger Cactus","overview":"Ladyfinger Cactus forms clusters of narrow cylindrical stems covered in small spines. It is compact, drought tolerant, and ideal for bright windowsills.","tips":"Use a gritty mineral-heavy mix and never let the pot sit in water."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"金手指仙人掌","overview":"金手指仙人掌会形成一簇簇细长圆柱茎，表面布满小刺。它株型小巧、耐旱，适合明亮窗台。","tips":"使用颗粒和矿物质比例高的介质，避免花盆长期积水。"}}
